question: Trace the data flow for circuit breaker reset on successful batch.
answer: The circuit breaker pattern in the inventory processing system is implemented through the consecutiveEmptyBatches counter and MAX_EMPTY_BATCHES constant (set to 3) in inventory-processing.service.ts. When processing batches, if a batch processes rows successfully (batchResult.processedCount > 0), the consecutiveEmptyBatches counter is implicitly reset to 0 because it only increments when processedCount equals 0. The flow is: (1) Process batch via processBatch(), (2) Check if batchResult.processedCount === 0, (3) If empty, increment consecutiveEmptyBatches, (4) If consecutiveEmptyBatches >= MAX_EMPTY_BATCHES (3), stop processing to prevent infinite loops, (5) If batch has results, continue processing which effectively resets the circuit breaker. This pattern prevents runaway processing when no data is being processed.
